name: Inihaw Na Bangus (Grilled Milkfish)
recipeInstructions:
1. With a sharp knife, cut along the back of the fish and remove the backbone.
Rub the fish inside and out with lemon slices, sprinkling with salt and pepper.
2. Mix the chopped tomatoes, onions, and green onions. Stuff the mixture through the back opening into the fish.
Wrap in foil and grill over live coals until done (about 15 minutes on each side).
3. Serve with lemon wedges or with a dip made from lemon juice and fish sauce.
Preparation and cooking time: 45 minutes
Serves 4
